title: Health Information Technician
description: Fortrea is seeking a Health Information Technician to manage clinical trial data and health information systems. You'll work fully remote, maintaining records and ensuring data integrity for research studies that advance medicine. If you're detail-oriented and passionate about healthcare research, this is your opportunity.
responsibilities: Manage and organize electronic health records for clinical research studies
Verify data accuracy and completeness according to study protocols and regulatory requirements
Prepare reports on data quality metrics and audit findings
Support data entry and ensure adherence to data governance standards
Assist in developing and maintaining standard operating procedures for data management
Coordinate with clinical and research teams regarding data-related questions

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Health Information Technology, Health Information Management, or related field
skills: Experience with electronic health record (EHR) systems
Knowledge of HIPAA and data privacy regulations
Proficiency with healthcare data management software
Strong organizational and attention to detail skills
certifications: RHIT (Registered Health Information Technician) or RHIA (Registered Health Information Administrator) preferred

benefits: Health, dental, and vision insurance coverage
Tuition reimbursement for continuing education and certifications
